board: Morning top candidate is evaluated by stock shape
stock: [AM_TOP] Morning top setup
Board is hot enough for morning top capture
Morning top gain zone is matched
Price is pinned near the intraday high
Price is far above VWAP
Turnover can support a seal or reseal
Volume is active without obvious exhaustion
Main or super capital is net inflow
Deal amount supports fast T+1 exit
Morning run has enough vertical spread

buyPlan.trigger: Use only a morning top or near-limit shape; skip if it cannot hold the high platform.

sellPlan.targetTime: Next trading day 09:30-10:00; sell before 10:00 unless the board remains sealed.
sellPlan.strategy: AM_TOP setup: catch the next-morning premium after a morning top or limit-up hold; exit fast on failure.
sellPlan.timeWindow: Next trading day 09:30-10:00; sell before 10:00 unless the board remains sealed.

rules: Morning top weakens and fails to reseal or hold the high platform
Break the personalized stop or fall back under VWAP with volume
Do not chase after the 09:40-10:00 decision window

stock: [TAIL_MAIN] Main tail setup
Board stays hot into the late session
T+1 gain room is healthy

Main or super capital is net inflow
Turnover is tradable
Price holds the upper half of the day

buyPlan.trigger: Track the high platform from 13:30; buy near 14:00 if price stays above VWAP.

sellPlan.targetTime: Next trading day 09:30-10:00; sell before 10:00 unless it quickly seals limit-up.
sellPlan.strategy: Target the T+1 morning impulse; 3%+ is acceptable, stronger sample-like shapes can aim higher.
sellPlan.timeWindow: Next trading day 09:30-10:00; sell before 10:00 unless it quickly seals limit-up.

rules: Next morning weak open and cannot reclaim the late-session platform
Break the personalized stop or the 14:00 entry trigger
Avoid widening the stop after purchase

news.title: 阿里港股大涨，财报前瞻显示云增长、闪购减亏好于市场预期阿里云收入增长加速至45%左右。  35分钟前
收盘｜沪指跌0.49% 人形机器人概念跌幅居前全市场超3700只个股下跌。  46分钟前
慢阻肺药物市场掀起交易热潮，阿斯利康19亿美元拿下这款中国创新药总交易额创国内呼吸领域近三年单产品对外授权之最。  2小时前
硬科技行业租赁活跃，深圳甲级写字楼空置率回落业主方的定价策略与市场预期也开始发生悄然变化。  4小时前
15万亿城市更新“大蛋糕”来了，资金平衡仍是最大痛点除了“钱从哪儿来”，城市更新要处理好项目分类、收益来源、风险分担和退出路径。  5小时前
A股四大股指集体高开，油气板块走强，浪潮信息一字涨停盘面上，电脑硬件、餐饮旅游、油气板块走强。  6小时前
从“有没有”到“好不好”，上海再保险中心建设顶层设计再完善在监管体系上，形成了“总局-地方-要素市场”三个层级。  6小时前
